alignment_restrictions: Any non-lawful (NG, NE, N, CG, CE, CN)

back_protection.description: Barbarians are difficult to surprise from behind, gaining a 5% per level bonus to detect rear attacks.

detect_magic.description: Barbarians can sense the presence of magic within 10 feet.

hide_in_natural_terrain.description: Barbarians can hide in natural outdoor surroundings.

leaping_springing.description: Barbarians can leap and spring with exceptional ability.

outdoor_tracking.description: Barbarians can track outdoors as a ranger of equivalent level.

first_aid.description: Barbarians can bind wounds to restore 1hp if applied within 1 round of taking damage.

surprise.description: Barbarians surprise opponents on 1-3 on d6 in outdoor settings.

magic_item_distrust.description: Barbarians initially distrust and refuse to use most magic items. They gain tolerance over time.

progression.levels_1_2: Will use potions only (with reluctance, must be convinced)
progression.level_4: Will use potions and weapons with temporary enchantments
progression.level_6: Will use magic armor, weapons, and protective devices
progression.level_7: Will use most non-written magic items
progression.level_8_plus: Will use any non-written magic items

magic_item_distrust.note: Barbarians will never read scrolls or use magic-user items like wands, rods, etc.

damage_resistance.description: Constitution-based damage resistance. The barbarian gains damage reduction.
damage_resistance.max_damage_absorbed: half of total damage per attack

save_bonus_vs_magic.description: +2 to all saving throws vs. spells and spell-like effects.
